data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ||' - '|| sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no_sum, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.memtype_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname , PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ) as age,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id,
sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position, (select description from sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position where group_position = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position) as group_position_desc, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long ,
sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_id , nvl(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount,0) as salary_amount ,
sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date, sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_id, (select sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount from sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_receipt_item where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'MFE' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0') as item_amount,
'!approve_date_2!' as approve_date_full, '!memtype_control!' as memtype_control_full
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_work_info , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_position , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_com_m_branch, sc_mem_m_application_form, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type and to_char(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'MM') = '07' and to_char(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , 'YYYY') = '2020'
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

data.name: c_memtype_control_full.Expression
data.value: Iif( [MEMTYPE_CONTROL_FULL] = '01','ประเภท สมาชิกสามัญ','') + Iif( [MEMTYPE_CONTROL_FULL]= '02','ประเภท สมทบ' ,'') + Iif( [MEMTYPE_CONTROL_FULL] = '!memtype_control!' ,'ประเภท สมาชิกสามัญ และ ประเภท สมทบ','')
